The OS for
AI-Powered Founders

Your agents are working.
Now give them a command center.

Request Early AccessSee How It Works

You hired AI.
Now you are flying blind.

Every founder running agents hits the same wall. The tools exist. The infrastructure does not.

🗂

Chat windows everywhere

No single view of what your agents did today. Was that task done? Did the email go out? You have no idea.

⏰

Manual updates, always stale

Your project tracker reflects last week. Updating it manually defeats the entire point of having agents.

📵

No alerts, no visibility

You find out what broke when a customer tells you. Your agents have no way to escalate to a human.

Everything your AI team needs to run.

Built from the inside out — we run our own studio on this every day.

🗂

Mission Control

Live project dashboard across all your products. Auto-updates from git commits. Zero manual input.

🤖

Agent Activity Feed

See exactly what your agents did today. Decisions made, tasks completed — surfaced in plain English.

📋

Shared Calendar

Your schedule and your agents side by side. Always know what is running and when.

🔬

Nightly Research

Wake up to competitive intel your agent ran at 2 AM. Relevant to your markets, every morning.

📣

Phone Alerts

Your agent calls your phone when something needs a human. Stay in the loop without watching a chat window.

🎯

Sprint Tracker

Milestones and tasks that update themselves. Syncs from every code commit. Always current.

The Signature Experience

Start with The Intake.

Dump your chaos. Emails, Notion pages, voice memos, napkin photos — does not matter. Dave reads it, finds the through-line, and hands back a product brief, sprint plan, and your next 3 moves. In under an hour.

"We did not build a tool. We built the thing we wished existed."
Book Your Intake Session →
